nebula-glass.title: NEBULA_GLASS
nebula-glass.content: Nebula Glass is a semi-corporeal substance found within the central Girvo cluster. Unlike standard matter, it exists in a state of constant refraction, bending light into solid geometry.

void-knights.title: VOID_KNIGHTS
void-knights.content: The Void Knights are the silent protectors of the Obsidian Gates within the Girvo vacuum. They possess no organic bodies; instead, their consciousness is housed within armor made of reinforced dark-matter shards.

girvo-cluster.title: GIRVO_CLUSTER
girvo-cluster.content: The Girvo Cluster is a dense collection of stars, nebulae, and cosmic phenomena located in the outer reaches of the galaxy. It is known for its unique gravitational anomalies and serves as a hub for interstellar trade and exploration.
